title: ELDK27 — Technical Session Topics
subtitle: Help us shape the agenda for Experts Live Denmark 2027
intro: Three questions, ~2 minutes. Pick the technical track that excites you most, rank the three sessions you'd most like to attend, and tell us what depth fits your level. We use the aggregate input to guide speaker outreach and session selection — no promises that every popular topic makes the cut, but every response is read and weighted.
thanksTitle: Thanks — your input helps shape ELDK27.
thanksBody: We can't promise every topic makes the cut, but every response is read and weighted when we guide speakers and finalise the agenda. Aggregated, anonymous results are public at the dashboard link below — share it with any speaker submitting to the Call for Speakers so they can align their abstract to what attendees want.

tracks.name: Security (incl. data security)
tracks.tagline: Defender XDR, Sentinel, Purview, identity attack defense, posture engineering

topics.title: Defender XDR end-to-end deployment
topics.summary: From licensing through MDE/MDI/MDO/MDCA rollout to first SOC playbook.

topics.title: Sentinel onboarding done right
topics.summary: Workspace design, data connectors, analytics-rule baseline, cost guardrails.

topics.title: Purview DLP + Information Protection labels
topics.summary: Labeling taxonomy, auto-labeling, endpoint DLP, Adaptive Protection.

topics.title: Insider Risk Management in anger
topics.summary: Policies that catch real exfiltration without drowning in false positives.

topics.title: Token theft, MFA fatigue, AiTM — modern identity attacks
topics.summary: How attackers break MFA today and what actually stops them.

topics.title: Writing detections in KQL
topics.summary: From an alert idea to a tuned, low-noise analytics rule.

topics.title: Copilot for Security in real SOC work
topics.summary: Where it earns its keep, where it doesn't, and prompt patterns that work.

topics.title: ASR rules + attack-surface reduction at scale
topics.summary: Block mode rollout strategy without breaking line-of-business apps.

levelExamples.introduction: Concepts, the moving parts, and a first walk-through of the portal/policy. "What is X, why care, and how do I get started?"
levelExamples.advanced: Patterns from real deployments. Configuration choices that matter, common pitfalls, and the questions to ask before you commit.
levelExamples.expert: Architectural deep-dive. Internals, edge cases, scaling pain, and the war stories. Bring your own scars.

levelExamples.expert: Architectural and edge-case deep-dive: declarative MDM internals, custom ADMX, conditional launch combinatorics.
